sigma.title: AWS Identity Center Identity Provider Change
Disabled MFA to Bypass Authentication Mechanisms
CA Policy Removed by Non Approved Actor
CA Policy Updated by Non Approved Actor

osquery.name: t1556_001_shadow_read
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE (target_path LIKE '%shadow%' OR target_path LIKE '%passwd%' OR target_path LIKE '%.ssh/%' OR target_path LIKE '%credential%') LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1556_001_proc_cred
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%shadow%' OR cmdline LIKE '%passwd%' OR cmdline LIKE '%mimikatz%' OR cmdline LIKE '%credential%' OR cmdline LIKE '%hashdump%' LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1556_001_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: AWS Identity Center Identity Provider Change
Disabled MFA to Bypass Authentication Mechanisms
CA Policy Removed by Non Approved Actor

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 11 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
